steps.title: Use the intercept input
steps.content: The $y$-intercept is where the graph crosses the $y$-axis, so the input is $x=0$.

steps.title: Evaluate the function
steps.content:
Substitute $x=0$ into the function.
$$f(0)=(-7)(3)^0+24$$
$$f(0)=(-7)(1)+24=17$$
So the $y$-intercept is $(0,17)$. The answer is A.
